sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n25433" key="dia/cimos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διάξιμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n25433.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be transferred,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cod.Just.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.15.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
